title: AGF proposed-story ticket
description: S097 GAME-DESIGN-PROPOSED-STORY-SCHEMA. A feature / mechanic / balance / content proposal filed by the game-design-agent terminal. Lives under backlog/proposed-stories/*.story-proposal.json. Promoted into sprint stories by scripts/backlog/promote-proposed.mjs.

agfFormatVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on a breaking change.

id.description: Stable ticket id. Pattern: GDP-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN (Game-Design Proposal). NNN is the next free three-digit slot for that date — auto-assigned by scripts/backlog/propose.mjs.

title.description: One-line proposal title. Mirrors the future story title when promoted.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the proposal was created (advisory; pattern-checked only).

kind.description: feature = new player-facing capability; mechanic = new gameplay rule / system; balance = tuning an existing rule; content = new assets / levels / characters that fit existing systems.

intent.description: Markdown body describing what the player should experience and why. The dev terminal uses this to write the story summary.

priority.description: MoSCoW priority. The dev terminal sorts proposals by priority at sprint-plan time.

epic.description: Target epic id (matches an existing backlog/epics/*.epic.json). Optional — the dev terminal can re-assign at promotion time.

rationale.description: Why this matters now — playtest finding, market reference, GDD section it derives from. Embedded into the promoted story's summary.

acceptanceHints.description: Hint list the dev terminal turns into proper verification entries. The first hint should be the human-visible acceptance case.

notes.description: Free-form notes (open questions, references). Not promoted into the story.
